aiBriefing.summary: After reading 27 full email threads and 38 Jira tickets with comments: only 2 emails truly need YOU right now. Sweety Rai has STOPPED the AI Bot beta program — no resolution for a month, she's escalated directly to you. Also submit Praneet Vajpayee's interview feedback on Keka (interviewed today at 12pm). On Jira, 29 tickets are open but 20+ are finance approvals you could batch-clear. The Beyours/Nilesh billing dispute spans Slack, email, AND Jira.
highlights: 🔴 BLOCKED ON YOU: Sweety Rai halted AI Bot beta program — her team flagged quality issues in Feb, got ZERO response for a month. Needs resolution plan from you/Pushkar/Siddhartha ASAP.
🔴 QUICK WIN: Submit interview feedback for Praneet Vajpayee (Assoc Dir Enterprise Sales) on Keka — interviewed today at 12pm.
🟡 VERIFY: Raoul cited 'as per Vijay's discussion' in Sudathi commercial terms (0.13 rate). Darshan claims you agreed to meta actuals (0.115). Confirm before this becomes a dispute.
🟡 DEADLOCK: Jan 2026 invoicing blocked — Siddhartha vs Ankit Makkar disagree on Meta billing vs RML webhooks as source of truth. May need you to break the tie.
🟡 FINANCE: 20+ Jira approval tickets (CNs, write-offs) — oldest from Apr 2024. Consider a 30-min batch approval session.
🟡 UK: JOY merchant confused about invoicing/trial. Team proposing to waive platform fee — be aware as KE International owner.
